item.description:
What's Changed

  • feat: terminal live activity, ref comparison bar, and UI improvements by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/3
  • fix: PR search dropdown floats over form instead of expanding modal by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/4
  • feat: add Pull, Copy Path, Open on GitHub to repository and worktree context menus by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/5
  • feat: markdown overlay sheet on cmd+click .md files by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/6
  • fix: pass remote source to GitService for remote repo diffing by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/7
  • chore: bump libghosttyx to 0.3.5 (ghostty v1.3.1) by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/9
  • style: replace custom menu bar popover with native NSMenu by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/10
  • feat: integrate Sparkle for automatic updates by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/8
  • ci: store DMG as GitHub Release artifact instead of git blob by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/11
  • ci: skip release workflow for non-code file changes by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/12
  • chore: move docs to root doc/ and gitignore generated files by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/14
  • style: replace effort level radio group with discrete slider by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/13
  • feat: improve diff view responsiveness for narrow viewports by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/15
  • fix: add timeout handling for remote SSH operations by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/18
  • docs: add API documentation section to CLAUDE.md by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/19
  • feat: add repository selector to Add Task form by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/17
  • feat: add terminal theme tester and fix light palette contrast by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/21
  • feat: add configurable macro bar for terminal sessions by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/22
  • feat: add diff viewer catalog, WCAG AA themes, and opt-in theme management by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/23
  • chore/update 2026 03 23 by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/24
  • style: smooth task list column resize by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/25
  • feat: add per-tab back/forward navigation with history by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/27
  • feat: add assignable keyboard shortcuts to macros by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/28
  • refactor: decompose ContentView into focused extension files by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/29
  • Remove SwiftTerm backend and related settings by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/31
  • Remove unused auto-play feature by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/32
  • ci: add concurrency limits to release workflow by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/33
  • feat: default worktree mode to project directory by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/35
  • fix: show repo and launch progress immediately in new task tabs by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/36
  • feat: session statistics dashboard for completed tasks by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/37
  • feat: remote session discovery by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/38
  • style: persist sidebar collapsed state across all tabs by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/40
  • feat: auto-assign GitHub issues on task creation and filter to unassigned by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/43
  • Move macro shortcuts from top-level menu to Tasks submenu by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/45
  • fix: fall back to default branch when current branch not in remote list by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/46
  • feat: slash command auto-complete for macros and task prompts by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/47
  • feat: Bonjour SSH host browser and SSH bug fixes by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/51
  • chore: lower macOS deployment target to 15.6 by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/55
  • fix: update sidebar status after remote source disconnect by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/56
  • feat: add Edit Issue context menu with title/body editing (#44) by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/53
  • feat: Finder Services integration — Add to Cortina (#41) by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/54
  • fix: mark orphaned tasks disconnected on launch and add Reconnect Terminal menu by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/57
  • Remove unused clipboard PR detection feature by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/58
  • fix: GitHub browser not loading issues or PRs for local repos by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/59
  • fix: upgrade libghosttyx to 0.3.6 — fix mouse selection offset on Retina by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/60
  • URL-based routing overhaul by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/62
  • fix: add visual feedback when switching repositories in task list by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/65
  • style: refactor remote connection modal + SSH IPv4 fix by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/64
  • feat: add kill session button to Tmux Sessions manager by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/66
  • feat: pricing estimator redesign with models.dev + receipt layout by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/68
  • refactor: surface plan mode toggle in add task modal by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/67
  • refactor: run research tasks in their own worktree by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/69
  • fix: macro keystrokes sent to wrong tab via stale focusedSceneValue by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/71
  • fix: prevent tasks from being marked disconnected during launch by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/70
  • refactor: default plan mode off, hide for research/review, remove --permission-mode plan by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/72
  • fix: update task state on terminal reconnect and prevent launch race by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/73
  • fix: restore closed tabs on relaunch by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/74
  • fix: restore completed task navigates in current window and shows terminal by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/77
  • feat: add Auto option to Claude effort slider by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/80
  • chore: compact task list row with icon-only badges by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/81
  • feat: add preview/edit tabs to GitHub issue editor by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/82
  • feat: add debug route URL to worktree footer by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/83
  • fix: remote repo resume path ignores RemoteSource by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/84
  • fix: prevent stuck progress view when refreshWorktrees fails by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/85
  • fix: reduce typing lag in add task modal by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/86
  • fix: Cmd+T opens new tab in current window instead of separate window by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/87
  • fix: set min height on task row to prevent clipping by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/88
  • fix: stop Window menu icon pulsation from scene-level @Observable tracking by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/89
  • feat: add close issue context menu and remove GitHub Browser window by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/90
  • fix: tasks started from Add Task modal open as tabs instead of new windows by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/93
  • feat: adopt swift-url-routing with CortinaRoute enum for type-safe navigation by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/91
  • ci: add PR build and test workflow by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/92
  • fix: macro shortcuts target wrong window with multiple main windows by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/95
  • Remove Statistics window by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/94
  • fix: preserve system Window menu items by moving Show Tab to AppKit by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/97
  • fix: ensure terminal view tears down when marking tasks as completed by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/99
  • Fix duplicate main windows on app launch by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/98
  • Adopt swift-dependencies for structured DI (#96) by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/102
  • Add ClaudeCommandClient, AttachmentClient, and OpenClient DI wrappers by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/103
  • Migrate view-layer callers to @Dependency DI by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/104
  • Replace NavigationStoreProtocol with @Dependency-based NavigationClient by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/105
  • Migrate DatabaseManager.shared and SSHConnectionManager.shared to swift-dependencies clients by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/106
  • Complete swift-dependencies DI migration (#107) by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/107
  • fix: replace remain-on-exit with shell wrapper, add sidebar branch display by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/108
  • fix: Open In context menu not showing terminal/editor apps by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/109
  • fix: resolve Task Not Found when connecting to discovered remote tasks by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/110
  • fix: use origin/ prefix when local branch missing during review task preparation by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/116
  • feat: add sparkle update indicator to toolbar by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/115
  • Add "Fork Session" context menu item to task list by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/113
  • feat: show task title and status in tab titles by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/117
  • fix: rescale terminal view when display resolution changes by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/119
  • Add "Cron" task type with /loop and /schedule support by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/114
  • feat: show commit ahead/behind indicator in sidebar repo rows by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/121
  • Recover cron task UI improvements from review branch by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/122
  • feat: add loading indicator during remote session discovery by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/123
  • feat: pull current branch and surface pull errors by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/124
  • perf: optimize input processing and store sync by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/129
  • fix: correct stale repoId in route and make footer URL copyable by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/125
  • feat: auto-focus PR selector on Review tab by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/128
  • fix: prevent Settings and auxiliary windows from opening as tabs by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/131
  • feat: organize contextual menus with submenus for better grouping by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/130
  • fix: migrate menu bar from SwiftUI Commands to AppKit NSMenu by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/133
  • feat: add Tasks tab to sidebar showing active tasks across all repos by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/132
  • fix: migrate to WindowGroup(for:) to fix tab routing bug by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/136
  • fix: prevent Window menu from losing system items on focus change by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/138
  • feat: surface task launch/reconnect errors and improve macro palette by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/139
  • feat: show discovery spinner in sidebar for remote sources by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/140
  • feat: add Close Tabs to the Right menu item by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/135
  • fix: improve check for update and macro palette functionality by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/141
  • fix: remove macro palette animation to fix inconsistent filter focus by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/142
  • feat: add completed task loading indicator and stats caching by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/144
  • polish: NNW-inspired native macOS design and bug fixes by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/145
  • refactor: standardize context menus with consistent grouping and view submenus by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/146
  • polish: restyle sidebar ahead/behind as capsule badge by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/147
  • fix: prevent git ref conflict when branch name contains multiple slashes by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/152
  • feat: add markdown file feedback with footnote comments (#63) by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/148
  • feat: migrate textile markdown renderer to MarkdownView by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/153
  • feat: auto-navigate to completed task route when task finishes by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/151
  • chore: remove fork session functionality by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/154
  • fix: respect user app preferences in menu items for terminal and IDE by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/155
  • refactor: remove Tasks view concept from sidebar by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/156
  • Fix: prevent crash when closing markdown preview by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/157
  • feat: add build-time feature switches system by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/158
  • feat: add Reset to Remote recovery action on pull conflict by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/159
  • chore: remove Close Tabs to the Right feature by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/160
  • refactor: split RepositoryStore and AddTaskView into domain-focused files by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/162
  • feat: add cancel button for stuck task preparation by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/161
  • fix: prevent markdown viewer hang when presenting comment sheet by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/164
  • fix: new task opens as tab instead of new window by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/165
  • fix: remove nested ScrollView causing main thread hang on CompletedTaskDetailView by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/166
  • feat: gate GitHub Issues section behind feature flag, add issue picker to Changes tab by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/163
  • ci: auto-generate Sparkle release notes for stable releases by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/167
  • feat: add plain text attachment support by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/168
  • Remove Cortina URL overlay from detail view by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/169
  • ci: generate Sparkle release notes for beta builds by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/170
  • fix: prevent macro text field reverting when containing slash commands by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/171
  • fix: escalate git process timeout from SIGTERM to SIGKILL by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/172
  • chore: remove route URL overlay from detail content view by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/174
  • fix: improve git timeout error handling and logging by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/173
  • perf: reduce TaskListView re-renders during task launch by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/176
  • fix(terminal): release ghostty surface and resources on tab close by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/175
  • fix(tabs): tab bar "+" button now opens a new tab instead of a window by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/177
  • feat: refresh branch name and ahead/behind on worktree refresh by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/178
  • perf: cut re-render cascades from tmux title and prompt typing by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/179
  • perf+fix: cut task-launch latency and eliminate NSTask wedge by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/180
  • perf: add TerminalRendering signposts and parallelize repo refresh by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/181
  • feat(tmux): add escape-time, focus-events, default-terminal, and status bar formatting by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/182
  • fix(tabs): restore Cmd+Shift+[ and Cmd+Shift+] tab switching by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/183
  • fix(macros): restore macro editor and fix typing in settings by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/185
  • feat(TaskKit): quick filter, sort fix, and pagination for completed tasks by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/184
  • Remove cron functionality from Cortina by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/187
  • Remove PiDevIntegration and GitHubIssues feature flags by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/188
  • Wrap RemoteSSH functionality in feature flag by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/189
  • feat(AddTaskView): redesign modal UX and restore GitHub issue picker by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/190
  • feat: add branch name skeleton loading state to prevent layout shift by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/191
  • Remove effort level control and notification indicators setting by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/192
  • Stop applying number formatting to issue and PR numbers by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/193
  • style: eliminate dead code identified by periphery 3.7.2 by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/194
  • style: apply swift-format to 36 files across app and packages by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/195
  • fix(terminal): intercept Cmd+V to prevent app termination in libghosttyx 0.3.8+ by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/196
  • fix(issues): improve GitHub issue selector UX by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/197
  • fix(terminal): prevent double paste with multiple terminal tabs by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/198
  • fix(sidebar): abort merge/rebase before reset to recover stuck repositories by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/199
  • fix(terminal): prevent double paste when multiple terminal views are active by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/200
  • fix(issues): round relative timestamps to nearest minute to reduce rerenders by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/206
  • fix(navigation): prevent duplicate RouteHistory entries on back-and-forth navigation by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/205
  • feat(task): cache gh pr/issue results per-repo to avoid redundant CLI calls by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/208
  • feat(tasks): pinned tasks — anchor high-priority tasks at top of task list by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/207
  • feat(terminal): persist TerminalView across navigation to preserve scroll history by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/209
  • chore(deps): bump libghosttyx to 0.3.13 by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/211
  • feat(scripting): add AppleScript support for xctrace performance testing by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/210
  • perf(terminal): defer ghostty_surface_new to next main-queue turn by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/212
  • feat(sidebar): add "Create New Task" context menu item for repositories by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/214
  • feat(sidebar): move pinning from tasks to repositories by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/213
  • fix(terminal): fix Cmd+Shift+click URLs via OSC 8; bump libghosttyx to v0.3.17 by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/215
  • fix(ci): prevent beta tags from re-triggering release workflow by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/216
  • fix(ci): make Tag source commit step idempotent by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/217
  • feat(sidebar): show pin indicator on pinned repositories by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/218
  • feat(terminal): add optional focus border with gradient ring by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/219
  • fix(terminal): preserve scrollback history across park/retrieve cycles by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/220
  • fix(sidebar): fix empty modal when creating task from sidebar context menu by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/221
  • fix(terminal): remove cortina ghostty config management, use user global config by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/222
  • refactor(tasks): remove hard-coded "Code review:" title prefix by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/223
  • feat(tasks): improve category icons and promote to leading position by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/224
  • fix(terminal): remove smcup/rmcup override and fix terminal-features accumulation by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/225
  • feat: Claude account profiles for per-repo CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/226
  • refactor: remove RemoteSource, SSHKit, and RemoteDiscoveryKit by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/227
  • fix(persistence): remove ON DELETE CASCADE from tasks FK by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/229
  • fix(tasks): remove legacy remote repo path from picker and evict stale repos on startup by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/231
  • feat(settings): add "Disable tmux configuration" toggle for bare tmux sessions by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/230
  • fix(terminal): collapse double-SIGWINCH on tab resume to prevent prompt box repeat by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/232
  • fix(terminal): fully remove TerminalViewCache to fix repeated Claude Code prompt by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/234
  • fix(tasks): persist model override so Review+Opus selection is honoured by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/235
  • fix(terminal): drive DeferredTerminalView teardown from SwiftUI View lifecycle by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/238
  • style(terminal): dim focus ring to grey when window is inactive by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/240
  • fix(tabs): pin toolbar chrome so sidebar and toolbar match across tabs by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/241
  • fix(windows): keep main window from resizing on Sparkle check-for-updates by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/243
  • fix(session): respect ClaudeProfile configDir for session stats lookup by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/244
  • feat: add environment variables per Claude profile by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/242
  • feat: smooth transition from live task to session statistics view by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/245
  • fix(terminal): preserve multi-line Cmd+V pastes via bracketed paste by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/246
  • feat(menus): add per-IDE submenu and fix missing editor icon by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/247
  • feat(menus): add New Window command and ungate New Task by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/248
  • fix(menus): rename "View" context menu label to "Open" by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/249
  • fix(macros): consume Tab in command palette filter by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/250
  • fix(task): split PR branch display onto separate lines; fix locale number formatting by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/251
  • fix(macros): implement Tab/Shift+Tab focus navigation in command palette by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/253
  • feat: PR-tracking worktrees for Review tasks by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/252
  • feat(editor): add markdown formatting bar to AddTaskView prompt field by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/255
  • feat(macros): add macro inspector panel with scoped sections and tmux dispatch by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/254
  • feat(a11y): Dynamic Type icon sizing across HIGH-priority callsites by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/256
  • fix(AddTaskView): shrink prompt editor when issue/PR detail card is visible by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/257
  • fix(stats): stop completed-task dashboard from oscillating with inspector open by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/258
  • fix(stats): stop completed-task dashboard from oscillating by @sjungling in https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/pull/259

Full Changelog: https://github.com/sjungling/cortina/commits/v1.0-beta.668
